# VTech App

VTech App is an independent free software project that publishes practical utilities for Windows users, technicians, and system administrators.

Website: https://vtech-app.com/
Apps: https://vtech-app.com/apps/
Downloads: https://vtech-app.com/downloads/
Contact: https://vtech-app.com/contact/

## Current apps

- Folder Size Explorer: Windows storage analysis tool for finding what consumes space across folders, drives, and file trees.
- Permission Preserving File Copier: planned Windows file and folder copy tool designed to preserve NTFS permissions.
- Windows File Server Permission Auditor: planned Windows file server auditing tool for reviewing folder permissions and risky access patterns.

## Publisher

VTech App publishes no-account, practical system utilities. Public contact email: vtechinf1@gmail.com.
